settings.heading: Get in Touch
settings.subheading: We love hearing from you. Whether it is a question about your order, a skincare concern, or just a hello — our care team is always ready.
settings.form_heading: How can we help you today?
settings.form_body: Fill in the form and a dedicated member of our skincare care team will respond within 24 hours. For urgent queries, WhatsApp or call us directly.
settings.faq_a1: Standard delivery takes 4–7 business days across India. Express delivery (1–2 days) is available for select pin codes. You will receive a tracking link via email once your order is shipped.
settings.faq_a2: We offer a 30-day hassle-free return policy on all unopened products. If a product did not meet your expectations, simply contact us and we will arrange a pick-up and full refund.
settings.faq_q3: Are Elanvi products suitable for sensitive skin?
settings.faq_a3: Yes! All Elanvi products are dermatologically tested, pH-balanced, and free from parabens, sulfates, and artificial fragrances. We recommend doing a patch test before full application if you have highly reactive skin.
settings.faq_q4: Do you offer a subscription or loyalty programme?
settings.faq_a4: Yes! Our Elanvi Ritual Club subscribers enjoy 15% off every order, early access to new launches, and free samples with every shipment. Sign up via the newsletter in the footer.
settings.faq_q5: How do I track my order?
settings.faq_a5: Once your order is dispatched, you will receive an email with a tracking number and a direct link to the courier portal. You can also track your order by logging into your Elanvi account.
settings.faq_q6: Are Elanvi products cruelty-free and vegan?
settings.faq_a6: All Elanvi products are 100% cruelty-free and never tested on animals. Most of our range is vegan; individual product pages indicate whether a formula contains any animal-derived ingredients.
